blended.narrative: White Pass is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,617 ft. Looking ahead, 52 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

Saturday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 53".
